    • Understanding the NFTab Specification

Collect a volumetric feature as a stacked array with spatial metadata

nf_collect_array.Rd

Resolves all observations for a 3D (volumetric) feature and stacks them into a 4D array [x, y, z, n_obs], preserving the NeuroSpace from the first resolved volume.

Usage

nf_collect_array(x, feature, .progress = FALSE)

Arguments

x

An nftab object.

feature

Character name of a volumetric (3D) feature.

.progress

Show progress messages every 10 rows? Default FALSE.

Value

A named list with two elements:

data

A 4D numeric array with dimensions c(x, y, z, n_obs).

space

The NeuroSpace object from the first resolved volume, or NULL if neuroim2 is not available or native resolution is not supported by the backend.

On this page
